gaps.title: Onboarding state machine race condition
gaps.breaks: Multiple concurrent API calls can put onboarding in invalid state
gaps.scenario: User rapidly clicks through wizard steps while processing KB documents, causing state inconsistency between onboarding_sessions and knowledge_documents
gaps.prompt: Write a test that simulates a user rapidly clicking through all onboarding steps while simultaneously uploading and processing multiple knowledge documents. Verify that the state machine properly handles concurrent transitions and maintains consistency between onboarding_sessions and knowledge_documents tables.

gaps.title: Tenant isolation in document processing
gaps.breaks: Documents from one tenant may be processed with another tenant's embeddings
gaps.scenario: High tenant uploads documents simultaneously while Celery workers are busy, causing document metadata to be associated with wrong company_id during vector embedding
gaps.prompt: Write a test that uploads documents from multiple tenants simultaneously and verifies that each document's vector embeddings are correctly associated with the correct company_id. Test concurrent uploads from 5+ tenants and verify no cross-tenant data leakage.

gaps.title: Email verification bypass
gaps.breaks: Users can complete onboarding without verifying work email
gaps.scenario: User submits email verification request, closes browser, returns later and completes onboarding without verifying email
gaps.prompt: Write a test that submits user details with an unverified email address and attempts to complete the onboarding flow. Verify that the system enforces work email verification before AI activation.

gaps.title: File upload vulnerability
gaps.breaks: Malicious files can be uploaded to knowledge base
gaps.scenario: User uploads a malicious script file with .txt extension that gets executed during processing
gaps.prompt: Write a test that attempts to upload various malicious file types (scripts with executable extensions, files with embedded scripts, oversized files) to the knowledge base. Verify that the system properly validates file types, scans for malicious content, and rejects dangerous uploads.

gaps.title: Consent timestamp manipulation
gaps.breaks: Legal consents can be backdated to bypass requirements
gaps.scenario: User modifies system time to backdate consent timestamps and activate AI without proper review
gaps.prompt: Write a test that attempts to submit legal consents with manipulated timestamps. Verify that the system validates that consent timestamps are current and rejects backdated or future-dated consent submissions.

gaps.title: Async processing failure handling
gaps.breaks: Failed document processing leaves onboarding in incomplete state
gaps.scenario: Large PDF upload fails during text extraction, leaving document in processing state forever
gaps.prompt: Write a test that uploads a large or malformed file that will fail during processing. Verify that the system properly handles processing failures, updates document status to 'failed', and allows user to retry or remove the failed document.

gaps.title: Integration validation bypass
gaps.breaks: Invalid integrations can be created without proper validation
gaps.scenario: User submits integration with invalid API credentials, system accepts it but AI activation fails
gaps.prompt: Write a test that submits integration configurations with invalid API endpoints, credentials, and malformed configurations. Verify that the system properly validates integration settings before saving and rejects invalid configurations.
